## Checklist

- [ ] Entry runs on a Mac mini (Apple Silicon or Intel)
- [ ] Alphabetical order preserved within subsection
- [ ] Description is one sentence, sentence case, ends with a period
- [ ] HTTPS URL that resolves
- [ ] Correct tags applied from the Legend
- [ ] No duplicate link already in the list
- [ ] `npx awesome-lint` passes locally
